name: Isaac Mizrahi
abstract: Isaac Mizrahi (born October 14, 1961) is an American fashion designer, actor, singer, television presenter and chief designer of the Isaac Mizrahi brand for Xcel Brands. Based in New York City, he is best known for his eponymous fashion lines.

concerts.label: Liza! at 80: A Celebration in Song and Dance
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jim Hall
about_quotes.evidence: for a long time, I would see Mizrahi and I kinda, I knew who he was but he wouldn’t even make eye contact... And then he got a dog... So he said, “It has already.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jim Hall — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
